message:
fix(ui): three editor dispatch bugs — body whitespace, missing issue guard, labels

1. parseBodyFromFrontmatter: replaced TrimSpace with TrimLeft("\n") +
   TrimRight to preserve significant leading whitespace in descriptions
   (e.g., indented code blocks). Only strips the expected newline
   separator between closing --- and body content.

2. editorExitMsg handler: added guard for issue no longer in issueMap
   after editor exit. Previously, a missing issue would diff against
   zero-value fields, potentially corrupting data via br update.

3. Labels: changed from editable frontmatter field to read-only comment
   since br update uses --set-n/--add-n/--remove-n flags, not a simple
   --labels. Prevents user confusion from silent no-op label edits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
